_cis_note: communication_impact_score (0–100): weighted by category, visual quality, theme/publication linkage, presence of recording/slides, international profile and recency. Documented in docs/research-communication-strategy.md.
_states_note: Per-asset 'state': approved-public | staged-for-review | metadata-only | rejected-private | rejected-low-value. No asset is approved-public yet; slides/video/photos require file-level copyright/consent review before a public derivative is generated. Event NARRATIVE pages (data/events.json) are approved-public because they are built only from already-public verified records.
